_doc: PyFiberAmp canonical Yb-amplifier example outputs, used as an external cross-validation reference. To regenerate, install pyfiberamp (pip install pyfiberamp; GPL-3.0) and run validation/generate_pyfiberamp_reference.py. The PyFiberAmp docs reference this configuration in the 'core-pumped Yb amplifier' tutorial. Fields below are intentionally null until the reference is generated locally — see validation/test_pyfiberamp_agreement.py for the comparison logic. The test skips itself when these fields are null.
notes_on_use: PyFiberAmp's internal solver almost certainly wraps scipy.integrate.solve_bvp (collocation). Our simulator uses iterative shooting. Both solve the same Giles-Desurvire BVP, but channel ordering, ASE-bin alignment, and σ-data sources can differ at the few-% level. A 5% agreement threshold is appropriate for a sanity cross-check — tighter agreement would require matching σ-data tables and grid centroids exactly.
